acid.shortDescription: 10% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Def by 1.
acid.description: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

acidarmor.description: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

acidspray.shortDescription: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2.
acidspray.description: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.

acrobatics.shortDescription: Power doubles if the user has no held item.

acupressure.shortDescription: Raises a random stat of the user or an ally by 2.
acupressure.description: Raises a random stat by 2 stages as long as the stat is not already at stage 6. The user can choose to use this move on itself or an adjacent ally. Fails if no stat stage can be raised or if used on an ally with a substitute.
